issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Must specify: (1) look at exactly 5 cards from top of deck, (2) filter excludes [Queen] cards, (3) reveal up to 1 card matching filter, (4) add to hand, (5) place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only searches by type name without the 5-card limitation, exclusion of Queen, or bottom-deck placement logic.
Filter uses ByName but should use type-based filtering for {Animal Kingdom Pirates}. Must also exclude [Queen] cards from selection.
